stories.name: Basic
stories.snippet:
const Basic = () => <Select disabled={false}>(<>
        <Option value="Option1">Option 1</Option>
        <Option value="Option2">Option 2</Option>
        <Option value="Option3">Option 3</Option>
    </>)</Select>;

stories.name: Opt Groups
stories.snippet:
const OptGroups = () => <Select disabled={false} onChange={(value) => alert(value)}>(<>
        <OptGroup label="Group 1">
            <Option value="Option1">Option 1</Option>
            <Option value="Option2">Option 2</Option>
        </OptGroup>
        <OptGroup label="Group 2">
            <Option value="Option3">Option 3</Option>
            <Option value="Option4">Option 4</Option>
        </OptGroup>
    </>)</Select>;

stories.name: HTML Select Reference
stories.snippet:
const HTMLSelectReference = () => (
    <select onChange={(e) => alert(e.target.value)}>
        <optgroup label="Group 1">
            <option value="Option1">Option 1</option>
            <option value="Option2">Option 2</option>
        </optgroup>
        <optgroup label="Group 2">
            <option value="Option3">Option 3</option>
            <option value="Option4">Option 4</option>
        </optgroup>
    </select>
);

const WithDescription = () => <TextField
    id="example-text-field-with-description"
    label="Example Text Field"
    description="This is a description for the text field." />;

stories.name: Required
stories.snippet:
const Required = () => <TextField
    id="example-text-field-required"
    label="Required Field"
    description="This field is required."
    required />;

stories.name: Disabled
stories.snippet:
const Disabled = () => <TextField
    id="example-text-field-disabled"
    label="Disabled Field"
    description="This field is disabled."
    disabled
    value="Cannot edit this" />;

stories.name: Error Message
stories.snippet:
const ErrorMessage = () => <TextField
    id="example-text-field-error"
    label="Example Text Field"
    error="This is an error message." />;

stories.name: Password
stories.snippet:
const Password = () => <TextField
    id="example-text-field-password"
    label="Password"
    description="Enter your password."
    type="password"
    required
    placeholder="••••••••" />;
